title: Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Cook spaghetti al dente. Fry guanciale until crispy. Beat eggs with grated pecorino. Toss hot pasta with guanciale, then quickly mix in egg mixture. Serve with extra pecorino and black pepper.

title: Classic Pancakes
instructions: Mix dry ingredients. Whisk milk and egg, then combine with dry mix. Melt butter in pan. Pour batter, flip when bubbly. Serve with syrup.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and paste for 2 hours. Grill or bake until charred. Sauté onion, garlic, ginger. Add tomato sauce and cream, simmer. Add chicken, cook 10 min. Serve with rice.
